description: Bergen Carbon Solutions AS operates as a clean carbon technology and materials company in Norway. It develops carbon capture and utilization technology that converts carbon dioxide into nano and macro carbon products, such as multi walled carbon nano tubes (MWCNT) and graphite for the battery industry. Bergen Carbon Solutions AS was founded in 2016 and is headquartered in Bergen, Norway.
